news:
Welcome to the pre-release of SpaceSlog, please note the game is still in its early stages and many bugs or issues may still be present. That said, if you find any bugs or have any suggestions then please visit our [color=ORANGE][url={forums_link}]forums[/url][/color] or [color=ORANGE][url={discord_link}]discord[/url][/color].

All features are still being added and expanded, what you are currently playing is not representative of the final game.

If you have any questions or feedback then please head over to our forums or discord following the links above.


Thanks and have fun!
demo_news:
Welcome to the demo of SpaceSlog, please note the game is still in its early stages and many bugs or issues may still be present. That said, if you find any bugs or have any suggestions then please visit our [color=ORANGE][url={forums_link}]forums[/url][/color] or [color=ORANGE][url={discord_link}]discord[/url][/color].

Several features have been omitted from this demo build with the intention to give players a small taste of what the game has to offer. What you are currently playing is not representative of the final completed product.

If you have any questions or feedback then please head over to our forums or discord following the links above.


Thanks and have fun!
exit_survey:
Thank you for playing the pre-release of SpaceSlog.

Please ensure you visit one of the links below to report any bugs or issues and to also offer any feedback.
Your feedback is highly valuable and I make sure I read every single post.

[color=ORANGE][url={discord_link}]Discord[/url][/color]
[color=ORANGE][url={forums_link}]Forums[/url][/color]
[color=ORANGE][url={steam_discussions_link}]Steam Discussions[/url][/color]


What to expect:
point_1: A procedurally generated galaxy to explore.
point_2: Different planets to discover and the means to explore them.
point_4: Ship to ship combat and boarding.
point_6: More alien lifeforms and other animals.
point_7: Derelict ships, facilities and other anomalies.
point_8: A different way to research and craft items.
